subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou by Whose Name the gates of men’s hearts have been opened wide, and by the fingers of Whose might the veils in which souls are wrapt have been torn aside!
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک فتحت ابواب القلوب و باصبع قدرتک انشقت سبحات النفوس اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
